How do I place an order?

column1: 您可以在产品页面点击"加入购物车"，然后在购物车页面点击"去结账"完成订单。
column2: You can click "Add to Cart" on the product page, then click "Proceed to Checkout" on the cart page to complete the order.

column1: 我们支持多种支付方式，包括支付宝、微信支付、PayPal等。
column2: We support multiple payment methods, including Alipay, WeChat Pay, PayPal, etc.

column1: 您可以在个人中心的订单页面申请退换货，我们会在收到退货后处理退款。
column2: You can request a return or exchange on the order page in your account center; we will process the refund after receiving the returned item.

column1: 一般情况下，我们会在1-3个工作日内发货，具体配送时间取决于您所在地区。
column2: Generally, we will ship the goods within 1-3 working days, the specific delivery time depends on your area.
How do I contact customer service?

column1: 您可以通过在线客服、电话或邮件联系我们，我们会在24小时内回复您。
column2: You can contact us via online customer service, phone, or email, and we will respond within 24 hours.

column2: When enabled: If a user is not found in the frontend Weline account library and the login name is an email, it will attempt the WeShop password login bridge (requires the WeShop customer module to be available). When disabled, only the local Customer account will be used.
